zh.lifeSummary: 當Effamia Lucy de Westby於1489年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本時，她的父親Thomas William de Westby26歲，母親Isabel Elizabeth Scott49歲。她和Thomas Lister II至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1519年在她的家鄉享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Effamia Lucy de Westby于1489年出生在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本时，她的父亲Thomas William de Westby26岁，母亲Isabel Elizabeth Scott49岁。她和Thomas Lister II至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1519年在她的家乡享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Westby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Selmer, Alf, Erik, Eyvind, Knut, Mauritz, Orvald, Thor.
English: habitational name from any of various places called Westby, for example in Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire, all named with Old Norse vestr ‘west, western’ + bý ‘farmstead, village’.

Norwegian: habitational name from any of twenty or more farmsteads, mainly in southeastern Norway, named in Old Norse as Vestbýr, a compound Old Norse vestr ‘west’ + býr ‘settlement’. Compare 1 above.

variants.name: Westbay
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian or Swedish   Westby  .

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

en.lifeSummary: When Effamia Lucy de Westby was born in 1489, in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas William de Westby, was 26 and her mother, Isabel Elizabeth Scott, was 49. She had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Thomas Lister II. She died in 1519, in her hometown, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Effamia Lucy de Westby est née en 1489, à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas William de Westby, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel Elizabeth Scott, avait 49 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Thomas Lister II. Elle est décédée en 1519, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Effamia Lucy de Westby 1489 in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas William de Westby 26 und ihre Mutter Isabel Elizabeth Scott 49. Sie hatte mit Thomas Lister II mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1519 im Alter von 30 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Effamia Lucy de Westby è nata il nel 1489 nel Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas William de Westby, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isabel Elizabeth Scott, aveva 49 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Thomas Lister II. Morì nel 1519, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Effamia Lucy de Westbyが1489年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンで生まれた時，父Thomas William de Westbyは26歳，母Isabel Elizabeth Scottは49歳であった。彼女はThomas Lister IIとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1519年に故郷で30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Effamia Lucy de Westby(이)가 1489년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas William de Westby(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Elizabeth Scott(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 Thomas Lister II(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1519년 그녀의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Effamia Lucy de Westby nasceu em 1489, em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas William de Westby, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Elizabeth Scott, tinha 49 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Thomas Lister II. Ela faleceu em 1519, em sua cidade natal, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Effamia Lucy de Westby родилась в 1489 г. в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas William de Westby было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Elizabeth Scott, 49. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Thomas Lister II. Она умерла в 1519 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Effamia Lucy de Westby nació en 1489, en Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas William de Westby, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel Elizabeth Scott, tenía 49 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Thomas Lister II. Murió en 1519, en su pueblo, a la edad de 30 años.
